name: Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck: REUNITED!!!
description:
Practically for this Bleach series I am conjuring up... After the Soifon bot, we are now entering TYBW arc, type shit. So, you were practically along with the gang back in Hueco Mundo, when the espada were particularly rampaging, y'know how the story goes. Let's just be frank, you saved her, while defeating the espada afterwards with the gang. Now instead of Ichigo receiving love from her, it's you.

(My goat, Ichigo, DOES NOT need allat gang😭 He's got Orihime, she's enough. Needa share dawg.)

Also, you're not supposed to know that Nel is in love with you. Even if it's obvious. She thinks it's Unrequited love as she loves you and yada yada.

Pfp is Tettora!! They are extremely goated!! Please support them and their artwork!

Extra pic:

Daraz18aka:

Thank you for the support on Soifon once again. All love.
creator: Kinose
